---
title: "measurments_completness"
format: html
editor: source
---

```{r, message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)

source("../../R/load_functions.R")
triggerR <- load_trigger_functions()
rm(load_trigger_functions)
dir.create("../../outputs/measurments_completness", showWarnings = F)
```

```{r}
accounts <- if (!exists("accounts")) {
  triggerR$active_accounts()
} else accounts

trigger_daily <- if (!exists("trigger_daily")) {
  triggerR$read_trigger_tables(granularity = "daily", cores = 5, min_obs_per_hour = 10)
} else trigger_daily

trigger_hourly <- if (!exists("trigger_hourly")) {
  triggerR$read_trigger_tables(granularity = "hourly", cores = 5)
} else trigger_hourly
```

## Hourly

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
library(forcats)
library(ggtext)
library(patchwork)

df_quality <- trigger_hourly %>%
  filter(!is.na(userId), type %in% c("sum", "mean")) %>%
  filter(date >= as.Date("2025-03-01"), date <= Sys.Date()) %>%
  select(userId, date, hour, source, measurement, n_records_total, n_obs_valid) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  group_by(source, measurement) %>%
  summarise(
    quality_ratio = sum(n_obs_valid, na.rm = TRUE) / sum(n_records_total, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_obs_valid = sum(n_obs_valid, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(quality_ratio)) %>%
  mutate(measurement = fct_reorder(measurement, quality_ratio)) %>%
  filter(measurement != "accuracy")

measurement_levels <- df_quality %>%
  arrange(quality_ratio) %>%
  pull(measurement)
```


```{r, fig.width=7, fig.ratio=.618}
p_quality <- df_quality %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = measurement, y = quality_ratio, fill = source)) +
  geom_col() + coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::label_percent(accuracy = 1),
    limits = c(0, 1)) +
  labs(title = "Measurement completeness",
       subtitle = "Proportion of valid observations for each measurement",
       x = NULL, y = "Valid / total ratio") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank()
  )

p_quality
```

```{r, fig.width=7, fig.ratio=.618}
p_volume <- df_quality %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = measurement, y = total_obs_valid, fill = source)) +
  geom_col() + coord_flip() +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Total valid observations",
       title = "Measurement coverage",
       subtitle = "Total number of valid observations available for each measurement") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank()
  )

p_volume
```

```{r, fig.width=14, fig.height=6}
p_completness_panel <- ggpubr::ggarrange(p_quality, p_volume, common.legend = T, legend = "bottom")
p_completness_panel
```

```{r, fig.width=14, fig.height=6}
p_hourly_valid_density <- trigger_hourly %>%
  filter(!is.na(userId), type %in% c("sum", "mean")) %>%
  filter(date >= as.Date("2025-03-01"), date <= Sys.Date()) %>%
  mutate(measurement = factor(measurement, levels = measurement_levels)) %>%
  filter(measurement != "accuracy") %>%
  select(source, userId, date, hour, measurement, n_obs_valid) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  filter(n_obs_valid > 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = n_obs_valid, color = source, fill = source)) +
  geom_density(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(12, 60), linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~ measurement, scales = "free", nrow = 4) +
  labs(
    x = "Valid observations per hour",
    y = NULL,
    title = "Distribution of hourly valid observations",
    subtitle = "Dashed lines indicate reference thresholds: 12 (~5-minutes) and 60 (~1-minutes)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, colour = "grey40"),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) 

p_hourly_valid_density
```

```{r}
ggsave("../../outputs/measurments_completness/measurments_completeness.png", 
       plot = p_completness_panel, width = 14, height = 6, dpi = 300)

ggsave("../../outputs/measurments_completness/hourly_validity_density.png", 
       plot = p_hourly_valid_density, width = 14, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
rm(list = ls(pattern = "^p_"))
rm(df_quality, measurement_levels)
```

## UpsetR Hourly

```{r}
library(ComplexUpset)

upset_df <- trigger_hourly %>%
  filter(!is.na(userId), type %in% c("sum", "mean"),
         source != "gps") %>%
  filter(date >= as.Date("2025-03-01"), date <= Sys.Date(),
         n_obs_valid >= 10) %>%
  select(userId, date, hour, source, measurement, value) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  unite("sample_id", userId, date, hour, sep = "_", remove = FALSE) %>%
  filter(!is.na(value))

measurement_sets <- upset_df %>%
  distinct(measurement) %>%
  pull(measurement)

upset_df <- upset_df %>%
  select(sample_id, measurement, value) %>%
  filter(sample_id != "61_2025-07-30_0") %>%
  mutate(present = !is.na(value)) %>%
  distinct(sample_id, measurement, present) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = measurement,
    values_from = present,
    values_fill = FALSE
  )
```

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=9}
library(ComplexUpset)

p_upset_hourly <- ComplexUpset::upset(
  upset_df,
  intersect = measurement_sets,
  sort_intersections_by = "cardinality",
  min_size = 500,
  width_ratio = 0.15,
  base_annotations = list(
    "Intersection size" = (
      intersection_size(
        counts = TRUE,
        bar_number_threshold = 1,
        text = list(
          angle = 45,
          size = 5,
          vjust = 0,
          hjust = 0
        ),
        text_colors = c(
          on_background = "black",
          on_bar = "black"
        )
      ) +
      scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(scale_cut = scales::cut_short_scale()),
                         expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
      ylab("Intersection size") + 
      theme(axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
            axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16)))
  ),
  set_sizes = (
  upset_set_size() +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::label_number(scale_cut = scales::cut_short_scale())
  ) 
)) +
  labs(
    title = "Overlap of hourly measurements",
    subtitle = "Measurements jointly available within the same user-date-hour",
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 20),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 16, colour = "grey40"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey90"),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank()
  )

p_upset_hourly
```


```{r}
ggsave("../../outputs/measurments_completness/upset_daily_with_sleep.png", 
       plot = p_upset_hourly, width = 12, height = 9, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
rm(p_upset_hourly, upset_df)
```


## UpsetR Daily


```{r}
tmp_sleep <- trigger_daily %>%
  filter(source == "sleep")

upset_daily_df <- trigger_daily %>%
  filter(!is.na(userId), type %in% c("sum", "mean"), source != "gps") %>%
  filter( !(userId == 61 & date == "2025-07-30")) %>%
  filter(
    date >= as.Date("2025-03-01"),
    date <= Sys.Date()
  ) %>%
  filter(n_hours_covered >= 16) %>%
  bind_rows(tmp_sleep) %>%
  select(userId, date, source, measurement, value) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  unite("sample_id", userId, date, sep = "_", remove = FALSE) %>%
  filter(!is.na(value))

rm(tmp_sleep)

measurement_sets_daily <- upset_daily_df %>%
  distinct(measurement) %>%
  pull(measurement)

missing_measurements <- setdiff(unique(trigger_daily$measurement), measurement_sets_daily)
missing_measurements

boolean_df <- upset_daily_df %>%
  select(sample_id, measurement, value) %>%
  group_by(sample_id, measurement) %>%
  summarise(
    present = any(!is.na(value)),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = measurement,
    values_from = present,
    values_fill = FALSE) %>%
  column_to_rownames("sample_id")
```

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=9}
p_upset_daily <- ComplexUpset::upset(
  boolean_df,
  intersect = measurement_sets_daily,
  mode = "distinct",
  sort_intersections_by = "cardinality",
  min_size = 50,
  width_ratio = 0.15,
  base_annotations = list(
    "Intersection size" = (
      intersection_size(
        counts = TRUE,
        bar_number_threshold = 1,
        text = list(angle = 45, size = 5, vjust = 0, hjust = 0),
        text_colors = c(on_background = "black", on_bar = "black")
      ) +
        scale_y_continuous(
          labels = scales::label_number(scale_cut = scales::cut_short_scale()),
          expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))
        ) +
        ylab("Intersection size")
    )
  ),
  set_sizes = (
    upset_set_size() +
      scale_y_continuous(
        labels = scales::label_number(scale_cut = scales::cut_short_scale())
      )
  )
)
```


```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=12}
p_upset_daily
```

```{r}
rm(measurement_sets_daily, p_upset_daily, missing_measurements, boolean_df, 
   upset_daily_df, measurement_sets)
```
